description_long: This sculpture features two dynamic, gold-painted figures mounted on rectangular white marble bases. The figures appear to be mythological or heroic, each holding a distinct weapon: one wields a trident, while the other brandishes a bow with a serpent-shaped arrow. Both figures are depicted in dramatic, action-oriented poses, with muscular forms and detailed anatomical features. The gold finish is highly reflective and textured, giving the figures a striking, opulent appearance. The marble bases are smooth and polished, providing a stable and elegant foundation for the figures. The overall composition suggests a narrative or symbolic scene, possibly referencing classical mythology.
description: A pair of gold-painted, action-posed mythological figures with weapons, mounted on polished white marble bases.
description_view_0: Side view showing both gold figures in profile, highlighting their weapons and the marble bases.
description_view_1: Front-facing view of both figures, emphasizing their upright stances and the details of their faces and torsos.
description_view_2: Rear angled view, revealing the backs of the figures and the curvature of their weapons.
description_view_3: Back view, focusing on the figures' postures and the marble bases from behind.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture is shown against a plain background.
